# Security Policy

## Supported versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.1.x   | ✅ Yes    |
| < 1.1   | ❌ No     |

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Do NOT open a public GitHub issue for security findings.**

Contact the Architect through the private channel at:
**https://www.jgaos2026-gif.com**

Include:
- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Your assessment of severity and impact

You will receive an acknowledgment within 72 hours. Confirmed findings
will be patched and credited (unless you request anonymity) before any
public disclosure.

## Scope

This repository is a **reference implementation**. The following are
explicitly out of scope for this security policy — they are proprietary
and not published here:

- Production cryptographic schemes and signing keys
- Brain adapter content and weights
- Customer-specific Sovereign Stitch deployments
- HSM/KMS bindings

See [`docs/SECURITY.md`](../docs/SECURITY.md) for the full security
posture statement.
